source: CMS Hospital Provider Cost Report (Final) FY2018–FY2023; CMS HCRIS HOSP10FY2024.zip for FY2024
method: Worksheet S-3 Part I line 14: employees on payroll FTEs (col 10) ÷ beds (col 2); FY ends Sept. When multiple cost reports fall in the same fiscal year, the longest reporting period is used.
note: National extract for hospitals in the Parigrado directory. Overlays.json may override curated series for selected CCNs (e.g. Mission 340002 FY2018 bed-count methodology).
